assumptions: Model load is unavailable in this environment due sklearn version mismatch.
simulated_available mode monkeypatches ML predictions with deterministic heuristics for behavior comparison only.
quality endpoint is evaluated on a deterministic sample for runtime practicality.
verification_steps: Install scikit-learn 1.1.x compatible with models/ and rerun this script to replace simulated_available comparison.
Increase --quality-sample-size to total corpus size to fully exhaust /quality route.
